purpose: Verify the CTDA v2 typed relevant-state key set and official collision-source availability for every frozen SafeLIBERO init state before any policy or action execution.

dataset.population: all four official SafeLIBERO suites, task indices 0-3, safety levels I/II, and init indices 0-49

coverage.required_state_keys: robot0_eef_pos/quat/gripper_qpos plus every source-bound mission subject position and resolved destination-anchor position
coverage.collision_source: the unique official obstacle position with z > 0 and x/y strictly within (-0.5, 0.5) meters

stop_conditions: selected GPU identity changes, memory gate fails, or a compute process is present
any required relevant-state key is absent or malformed
the official active-obstacle source is not unique for any init
any scenario is missing an exact source-bound semantic template
claim_boundary: This protocol can establish only initial-state observation-key and collision-source coverage. It cannot establish task success, safety, CTDA authorization, progress quality, intervention quality, policy compatibility, or rollout readiness.
